title: trigger onTabButton
text: trigger onTabButton The onTabButton trigger is used to implement the processing that should occur when a user clicks the tab button in the active tab. Explain this code trigger onTabButton ; enter your code here end ; trigger onTabButton" Copy Applies to: Form widgets: utabex (TabEx) Activation: Activated when the user clicks the tab button on a tab. Default behavior: None Behavior upon completion: None Description The onTabButton trigger is typically used to close the active tab when the user clicks on the tab button. This button is displayed only if the TabButton property of the TabEx widget is True . Applies To Related Links Tab Button ( button) Determines whether the active tab displays a button, such as a Close button, that executes the onTabButton extended trigger when clicked. True or False (default). Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
